_comment: Potion recipes for the Alchemist crafting system. Each recipe requires reagents from the party stash and an INT check (d20 + INT mod >= dc).

Healing Potion.name: Healing Potion
Healing Potion.description: A ruby-red elixir that mends wounds.

Mana Potion.name: Mana Potion
Mana Potion.description: A shimmering blue draught that restores magical energy.

Antidote.name: Antidote
Antidote.description: A bitter tincture that neutralizes poison.

Fire Oil.name: Fire Oil
Fire Oil.description: A volatile oil that can be thrown to create a burst of flame.

Elixir of Strength.name: Elixir of Strength
Elixir of Strength.description: A thick crimson brew that temporarily boosts physical might.

Elixir of Warding.name: Elixir of Warding
Elixir of Warding.description: A silver-tinged potion that hardens the skin against blows.
